overall.description: Gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a first-person perspective walk through the affluent Richman suburb of Los Santos. The character moves from a palm-lined sidewalk past a real estate sign, along a street with moderate vehicle traffic, and finally enters the driveway of a modern luxury home.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban sidewalk with stone retaining walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the suburban sidewalk past landscaped stone walls and palm trees

entered.detail: low stone wall with concrete cap running along the property line
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk
contemporary multi-level house built into the hillside with glass windows
yellow and green real estate sign for Wolfs International Realty with phone number 555-0161

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny suburban sidewalk bordered by stone walls and palm trees. A prominent real estate sign stands on the lawn to the left. The camera moves forward along the concrete path with a modern hillside house visible in the background.

events.description: large green garbage truck drives past on the road
purple taxi and red sports car speed through the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the roadside and crossing through the intersection with active vehicle traffic

notable_agents.action: green garbage truck with recycling logo driving past the camera
purple taxi cab with roof sign driving through the intersection

entered.detail: single-story white suburban homes with red tile roofs
row of tall narrow evergreen trees lining the property
wooden power poles with overhead lines running along the street

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wider suburban street with active traffic. The camera walks along the asphalt road as a garbage truck passes by, followed by a taxi and sports car at the intersection. White tract homes and tall cypress trees line the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow residential alley with tree canopy

events.description: turns left from main road onto narrow residential side street

agents.ego_description: turning left off the main road onto a quieter tree-lined residential alley

entered.detail: narrow asphalt street with cracked pavement and overhanging trees
tall white concrete walls with iron fencing marking property boundaries
contemporary white stucco house with dark wood paneling and large windows

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left onto a narrow, tree-canopied residential alley away from the main traffic. Concrete walls line the left side while a modern white house with contemporary architecture becomes visible ahead on the right. The street is quieter and more enclosed by vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: private cobblestone driveway of luxury home

events.description: enters the cobblestone driveway leading to the modern house garage

agents.ego_description: walking up the private cobblestone driveway toward the house entrance and garage

entered.detail: decorative cobblestone paving with brick border patterns
large dark glass-paneled garage door on the modern house
tall manicured green hedges providing privacy screening

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera entering the private cobblestone driveway of the modern luxury home. The house moves from the mid-ground to the immediate right as the camera approaches the garage door. Manicured hedges and white stucco walls create an enclosed, upscale entrance area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sunny public sidewalk through a bustling suburban street and into the private grounds of a luxury estate. It begins by moving along a concrete path bordered by stone walls and palm trees, passing a prominent real estate sign with a hillside house visible in the distance. As the camera reaches the main road, the environment opens into a wider street filled with active traffic, including a passing garbage truck and sports cars amidst a backdrop of white tract homes and tall cypress trees. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left into a quieter, tree-canopied residential alley, where the noise of traffic fades and contemporary white architecture emerges through the vegetation. Finally, the movement leads directly into a private cobblestone driveway, passing manicured hedges and white stucco walls as the camera approaches the garage of the modern luxury home.
